title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bayer India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bayer India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Bayer India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!
